title: Web Research Agent with Real-Time Search and Content Extraction
description: A voice agent that searches the web and extracts page content using the Tavily API, then synthesizes results into conversational responses. Uses Tavily's fast search depth for low-latency voice interactions and deep content extraction for specific pages.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Calls Tavily Search API and returns formatted results to the LLM. Uses fast search depth for low-latency voice interactions with max 5 results.

tools.name: web_extract
tools.description: Extracts full content of a webpage by URL using Tavily Extract API. Content is truncated to 3000 characters for LLM context management.
